system.moves:
**Manifests** as a grumpy little person.

**Expects** sprinkles of salt, poured-out whisky, reverent touches.

See also the following **elemental spirits** (pages @UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.HOWpYxmR8Q44qS3E]{360}-@UUID[Compendium.stonetop.wider-world-and-other-wonders.JournalEntry.HOWpYxmR8Q44qS3E]{361}):

- Beast wardens (for livestock)
- Fertility spirits
- Meadow/prairie/grass spirits (for the fields)
- Rock/stone spirits (for the Stone or the Ringwall)
- Stream/creek spirit (for the Stream).
